name: Florian Shkurti
sub_directions: Safety guarantees during robot learning and deployment
Differentiable physics and generative models for simulation
recent_papers: Learning-based Task and Motion Planning with Safety Guarantees
Active Perception and Semantic Mapping in Dynamic Environments
Differentiable Physics and Generative Models for Robot Manipulation Simulation
interest_paragraph: I am particularly drawn to Professor Shkurti's work in the Robot Vision and Learning lab, especially the focus on enabling robots to perceive, reason, and act safely in dynamic environments. My background in AI agents aligns well with the lab's emphasis on reasoning and learning for robotics, including imitation and reinforcement learning, and the goal of specifying robot tasks without explicit coding. I am eager to contribute to projects involving safety guarantees during robot learning and deployment, potentially leveraging differentiable physics simulators for robust agent development.
